text:
(a) A peace officer or a person designated by a political subdivision to enforce parking regulations may file a charge against a person who commits an offense under this chapter at a parking space or area designated as provided by Section 681.009 (Designation of Parking Spaces by Political Subdivision or Private Property Owner) .

(b) A security officer commissioned under Chapter 1702 (Private Security) , Occupations Code, and employed by the owner of private property may file a charge against a person who commits an offense under this chapter at a parking space or area designated by the owner of the property as provided by Section 681.009 (Designation of Parking Spaces by Political Subdivision or Private Property Owner) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 681. Privileged Parking
##### § 681.010 — Enforcement

(a) A peace officer or a person designated by a political subdivision to enforce parking regulations may file a charge against a person who commits an offense under this chapter at a parking space or area designated as provided by Section 681.009 (Designation of Parking Spaces by Political Subdivision or Private Property Owner) .

(b) A security officer commissioned under Chapter 1702 (Private Security) , Occupations Code, and employed by the owner of private property may file a charge against a person who commits an offense under this chapter at a parking space or area designated by the owner of the property as provided by Section 681.009 (Designation of Parking Spaces by Political Subdivision or Private Property Owner) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 1420, Sec. 14.840, eff. Sept. 1, 2001.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A security officer commissioned under Chapter 1702 (Private Security) , Occupations Code, and employed by the owner of private property may file a charge against a person who commits an offense under this chapter at a parking space or area designated by the owner of the property as provided by Section 681.009 (Designation of Parking Spaces by Political Subdivision or Private Property Owner) .
